title: MultiMace Textures -  YashhPenchi
description: MultiMaces is a clean PvP texture pack that adds distinct custom visuals for Density, Breach, and Normal Maces, making them easier to identify instantly during combat.
body:
# MultiMaces — Custom Mace Texture Pack

![Front](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c00e926d78b7d0b7dd4b6054c97e0df894c1a103.png)

MultiMaces is a PvP-focused resource pack built around one specific problem — in fast combat, all maces look the same, and that split-second confusion costs you fights. This pack gives each mace type its own distinct texture so you can tell them apart instantly without thinking about it.

Density, Breach, and Normal Mace all look different now. That's the whole point.

---

![Banner 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a36b2b219a3168508a70286907cf5c13096f6b05_0.webp)

---

## What it does

- Unique textures for Density Mace, Breach Mace, and Normal Mace
- Clean, minimal design — no visual noise added
- Instant visual identification during PvP without slowing down
- Pairs well with PvP utility mods

---

## Compatibility

Works on Minecraft 1.21.x. Compatible with Fabric, Vanilla, and most PvP clients. No performance impact.

---

## Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file
2. Drop it into your `resourcepacks` folder
3. Enable it in-game

---

![Thumbnail Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b6fd8bb981fa9f72d8f0d1397c27a589b517dfc.jpeg)

---
